title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 87.480 - Board of trustees to make report
text:
87.480.  Board of trustees to make report. — The board of trustees shall make report to the legislative body of such city of the condition of said pension funds immediately after the first meeting of said board in January of each year.
(RSMo 1939 § 9539) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 8974; 1919 § 9075; 1909 § 9900
